action.description: Read Third Time in Full – PASSED - 50-17-3AYES – Alfieri, Barbieri, Beiswenger, Bingham, Boyle, Cannon, Cheatum, Church, Crane(12), Crane(13), Dygert, Egbert, Ehardt, Erickson, Fuhriman, Galaviz, Gannon, Green, Hall(Stone), Harris, Hawkins, Haws, Healey, Hill, Holtzclaw, Manwaring, Mathias, McCann, Mendive, Mickelsen, Miller, Monks, Nelsen, Palmer, Petzke, Pickett, Pohanka, Raybould, Redman, Rubel, Sauter, Scott, Shepherd, Shirts, Tanner(13), Vander Woude, Veile, Weber, Wheeler, Mr. SpeakerNAYS – Bruce, Burgoyne, Cayler, Ehlers, Furniss, Garner, Handy, Hostetler, Leavitt, Marmon, Mitchell, Price, Rasor, Raymond, Skaug, Thompson, WisniewskiAbsent – Berch, Cornilles, Tanner(14)Floor Sponsors - Boyle & ShirtsTitle apvd - to Senate
